rationale: Educ. Code §49.201 governs inter-district student transfer agreements to reduce local revenue levels. It does not reference or depend on the homestead exemption amount in Tax Code §11.13(b). No direct conflict exists.
quote: The board of trustees of a district with a local revenue level in excess of entitlement may execute an agreement to educate the students of another district
_note: No direct textual conflict. Indirect fiscal effects on district revenue levels are possible but not addressed by this section's operative language.
